notes: Loads cached historical prices and evaluates realized returns after each date.
Rebalance dates are calendar diagnostics; model windows still exclude the rebalance date.
Robustness covariance wrapper changes only the estimator.
Convex backtest estimates covariance from trailing returns only.
Budget target is derived from past-window asset risk and bounded state inputs.
Cost levels are fixed diagnostics and are not selected from outcomes.
One-at-a-time perturbations around the selected public configuration; no candidate search is performed.
Stress periods are identified ex post solely for evaluation.
Solver status summarizes optimization diagnostics after the fact.
